code:
type DivError =
  | DivByZero
  | Overflow

fn safe_div(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Result<Int, DivError>
  if b == 0
    Err(DivError.DivByZero)
  else
    Ok(a / b)
  end
end

fn report(_ r: Result<Int, DivError>) -> Unit
  match r
  when Ok(v)
    println("ok=#{v}")
  when Err(DivByZero)
    println("err=DivByZero")
  when Err(Overflow)
    println("err=Overflow")
  end
end

report(safe_div(42, 7))
report(safe_div(10, 0))
